name: Hedgehog Go Home
description: Hedgehog Go Home is a charming puzzle game where you help the hedgehog find a safe way home. Plan the route, push obstacles, and avoid traps to clear the path. Each level has a different layout, with increasing difficulty that requires observation and logical thinking. The gameplay is simple, relaxing, but addictive. Download Hedgehog Go Home now and guide the hedgehog back to its nest!
